message:
test(lab): add multi-worker replay trace determinism test

Extends the lab test suite with verification that replay traces are
deterministic across multiple runs with the same seed, even with
multiple workers.

New test_lab_replay_trace_determinism_multiworker:
- Uses 4 workers to stress concurrent scheduling paths
- Spawns 6 tasks, each yielding 3 times
- Records ReplayEvent traces from two identical runs
- Asserts that event sequences match exactly

The test validates that:
1. Replay traces are non-empty (actual execution occurred)
2. Event ordering is deterministic given fixed seed
3. Multi-worker scheduling doesn't introduce non-determinism

Additional test fixes:
- Updates lab_determinism.rs to use schedule_cancel() instead of
  deprecated move_to_cancel_lane() in cancel drain stress test
- Silences unused variable warning for idx in lab_execution.rs

This strengthens confidence in the replay system's ability to reproduce
exact execution sequences for debugging and time-travel debugging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
